exercises.title: KEM Protocol Flow
exercises.description: Design a complete hybrid KEM protocol flow diagram.
tasks: Show key generation for both components
hints: Include both X25519 and ML-KEM operations

exercises.title: Size Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze sizes for different hybrid KEM combinations.
hints: Include pk, sk, ct, and ss sizes

exercises.title: Error Handling
exercises.description: Design error handling for hybrid KEM implementation.

exercises.title: Performance Benchmark
exercises.description: Benchmark hybrid KEM performance vs alternatives.
